title: TechFest 2K25
description: Annual flagship technical festival featuring hackathons, coding contests, robotics challenges, and paper presentations.

title: Annual Cultural Fest
description: Celebrate talent, music, and art at the Annual Cultural Fest — stage performances, fashion shows, street plays, and live concerts.

title: Sports Meet 2K25
description: Annual inter-departmental athletic competition featuring track and field, volleyball, basketball, and football.

title: National Hackathon 2025
description: A 36-hour hackathon where student teams build innovative solutions for real-world problems, mentored by industry engineers.

title: AI & Data Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop on AI fundamentals, data preprocessing, model training, and deployment with industry experts.

title: Entrepreneurship Summit
description: An intensive summit for aspiring student startup founders — ideation, validation, business model canvas, and pitch preparation.
